subcodes.first_line: The first light that shone forth and gleamed, and the first fragrance that diffused and wafted - upon thee, O Dayspring of prosperity and Manifestation of success [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول نور اشرق و لاح و اول عرف تضوع و فاح علیک یا مطلع الفلاح و مظهر النجاح
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for forgiveness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @visitation Tablets
